description_long: This is a compact, rectangular, metallic toaster with a smooth, glossy dark gray finish and rounded edges. The front panel features two black control knobs, one for adjusting the toasting level and another for selecting functions, along with a lever for lowering bread slices. The top surface has two wide, parallel toast slots with metallic grates visible inside, suitable for standard bread slices. The sides and back are plain, with the brand name 'Teftel' printed in a subtle, modern font on both sides. The toaster sits on a black base, and no power cord or crumb tray is visible in these views.
description: A sleek, dark gray metallic toaster with two toast slots, black control knobs, and the 'Teftel' brand name on the sides. The design is modern and compact with a glossy finish.
description_view_0: The narrow side of the toaster, showing a smooth, featureless metallic surface with rounded edges.
description_view_1: The broad side of the toaster, displaying the 'Teftel' brand name centered on a glossy gray surface.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow side, featuring two black control knobs, a lever, and subtle function markings.
description_view_3: The other broad side, identical to view 1, with the 'Teftel' brand name and no additional features.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'Teftel' is printed in a modern, sans-serif font on both broad sides of the toaster, centered and in a slightly lighter gray color.
attribute_control_knobs: Two black, round control knobs are present on one narrow side: one larger knob with a numbered dial for browning control, and a smaller function knob below it, both with white markings.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, rectangular toast slots are located on the top surface, parallel to each other, with metallic grates visible inside.
